title: Principal Plant Manager at Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises:
Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises!
